# Workspace & 估值表 Redesign Plan

**Status:** Proposal (2026-04-23)
**Author:** Generated by review of current code + two reference screenshots
**Scope:** The `/my-knowledge` page (今天的"研究工作台 → 个人知识库") and everything inside it — folder tree, document list, "估值表" tab, and surrounding chrome. Backend changes are scoped to `backend/app/api/user_kb.py`, the `kb_folders` table, and the `user_knowledge_base.documents` collection.

---

## 1. Why redesign

Two screenshots motivate this document — our current page (`/my-knowledge` with the 估值表 tab open) vs. alphapai-web.rabyte.cn's `/reading/paiwork` (internally "ai-workbench", brand name "PaiWork"). Side-by-side:

| Dimension | Ours (today) | PaiWork (reference) |
|---|---|---|
| **Overall shell** | Two-pane split: tree on the left, one active document on the right | Three-pane: app-rail (Ask PaiPai / PaiWork switch), workspace panel (folders + skills), editor canvas with browser-style document tabs |
| **Folder tree** | Flat Ant Design `DirectoryTree`, gets cramped fast (image shows ~18 stocks stacked with no grouping) | Indented outline with small icons, each stock pre-seeded with a mini file system: `key-driver.md`, `notes.md`, and subfolders 模型 / 轮播 / 研报 / 公司公告 / 专家访谈 / 公司交流 / 调研 / 其他 |
| **Document surface** | Single right pane, two horizontal tabs ("关联通讯" / "估值表"). Can only look at one document at a time, losing context when switching stocks | Browser-style tab bar with 3 open documents (`未命名.xlsx`, `notes.md`, `key-driver.md`), tabs persist across folder navigation |
| **Spreadsheet editor** | Hand-rolled CSS grid, toolbar = `+行 / -行 / +列 / -列 / 保存`, formula bar + 5 functions (`SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT`) | Full Excel-style ribbon (开始 / 插入 / 公式 / 数据 / 视图 / 设置), professional gridlines, multiple sheet tabs, conditional format affordances |
| **Skills concept** | None | Dedicated **Skills** tab next to 工作区; "Skills广场" at the bottom to install reusable analysis templates; per-stock 轮播 + 其他 skill buckets |
| **Navigation entry** | "个人知识库" buried under "研究工作台" group in the left sidebar (image 1 sidebar shows many icons, no prominence) | "PaiWork" gets its own app-rail tile with the 工作台 icon, positioned alongside "Ask PaiPai" as a first-class app |
| **Visual language** | Default Ant Design blue, `#2563eb` selection outline, grey headers, cramped type | Cleaner whitespace, green accent `~#2ec98a`, VS-Code-ish tree density, Excel-like cell grid |
| **Data model** | One `spreadsheet_data` blob per stock folder (lazy-seeded); no multi-sheet | Multi-sheet documents, multi-document folders, markdown + spreadsheet peer-citizens |

The current 估值表 implementation is a *functional prototype*. The user can edit cells, formulas compute, changes autosave. But the chrome around it (tree, tabs, toolbar) is default-AntD boilerplate, and the spreadsheet itself cannot match Excel / Google-Sheets expectations on drag-fill, column resize, copy-paste, undo, charts, or multiple sheets. This plan is about closing that gap for an internal-use tool.

---

## 2. Goals / Non-goals

**Goals**
1. **Match the PaiWork visual paradigm** — three-pane app shell, browser-style document tabs, Excel-grade spreadsheet, markdown peer documents inside stock folders.
2. **Make 估值表 first-class** — support multiple sheets per document (`估值表`, `敏感性分析`, `同业对比` as tabs *inside* one file), drag to resize rows/cols, copy-paste, undo/redo, a proper formula set (IF / IFS / IFERROR / ROUND / ABS + the existing range funcs), and freezable header rows.
3. **Add reusable Skills** — "Skills" tab alongside 工作区, backed by `kb_skill_templates`. First-party templates: 标准DCF、三张报表、同比同业对比、估值敏感性。
4. **Pre-seed a useful stock folder** — every stock in 持仓股票 gets `key-driver.md`, `notes.md`, and the subfolder taxonomy 研报 / 公司公告 / 专家访谈 / 公司交流 / 调研 / 模型 / 其他. Existing stock folders keep whatever 估值表 is there.
5. **Keep the URL stable** — the route stays `/my-knowledge`; we are not spinning up a new page alongside the old one. Users land on the new workspace when they next refresh.
6. **Zero regression on AI chat RAG** — `user_kb_search` / `user_kb_fetch_document` keep working unchanged against the new schema.

**Non-goals**
- Real-time collaboration (no Yjs / Liveblocks). Single-editor-at-a-time with last-write-wins is fine for internal use.
- Importing `.xlsx` binaries losslessly. We'll support "paste from Excel" at the cell-range level. Binary xlsx import/export is a follow-up.
- Server-side formula evaluation. All formulas run in the browser like today.
- Charts embedded *inside* the spreadsheet grid (merged-range canvas). Charting gets a separate "insert chart" affordance that renders echarts in a docked side panel, not as a floating cell.
- Permissions finer than the current scope model. No per-cell ACL, no audit trail beyond `updated_at`.
- A mobile view. The target is ≥1440px desktop.

---

## 3. Target information architecture

```
 ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │  Top nav (unchanged: search, alerts, user menu)                      │
 ├────────┬─────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┤
 │  APP   │  WORKSPACE PANEL        │  EDITOR CANVAS                   │
 │  RAIL  │  ┌─ Tabs ───────────┐   │  ┌─ Doc-tab bar ───────────────┐ │
 │        │  │ 工作区 │ Skills  │   │  │ 贝仕达克.xlsx │ notes.md │ + │ │
 │ Ask    │  └─────────────────┘   │  └──────────────────────────────┘ │
 │ PaiPai │  [Scope: 个人/公共]    │  ┌─ Ribbon ─────────────────────┐ │
 │        │                        │  │ 开始 插入 公式 数据 视图 设置 │ │
 │ Pai-   │  ▾ 持仓股票            │  ├──────────────────────────────┤ │
 │ Work*  │    ▾ 美股              │  │ [ ]  [B I U]  [fx][Σ]  [🔢] │ │
 │        │      ▾ 英伟达          │  └──────────────────────────────┘ │
 │ KB     │        📄 key-driver.md│  ┌─ Sheet tabs ─────────────────┐ │
 │        │        📄 notes.md     │  │ [估值表] [敏感性] [同业] [ + ]│ │
 │ Notes  │        📊 估值表        │  └──────────────────────────────┘ │
 │        │        ▸ 研报 (12)     │  ┌─ Grid ────────────────────────│ │
 │ ⋮      │        ▸ 研究纪要 (3)  │  │    A          B      C    D   │ │
 │        │        ▸ 模型          │  │ 1  指标/Metric 单位  2023A ...│ │
 │        │      ▸ AAPL            │  │ 2  营业收入    亿元  ...      │ │
 │        │    ▸ A股               │  │ 3    同比增长率 %    =(B2-A2) │ │
 │        │    ▸ 港股              │  │ ...                           │ │
 │        │  ▾ 自建文件夹          │  │                               │ │
 │        │    ▾ AI / 半导体        │  │                               │ │
 │        │  ▸ 持仓概览            │  └───────────────────────────────┘ │
 │        │  ─── Skills广场 ───    │  ┌─ Status bar ─────────────────┐ │
 │        │  (on Skills tab)       │  │ Sheet1 · H1:H22 · Sum=... · 保存中… │ │
 └────────┴─────────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Three vertical zones**:

1. **App rail (48px wide, leftmost).** Vertical icon stack. Today's sidebar has "研究工作台" as a menu group; we fold that group into the rail. Items, top to bottom: *Ask PaiPai* (routes to AI Chat), *PaiWork* (this page, highlighted), *Dashboard*, *News*, *Watchlist*, *Portfolio*, then platforms. Collapsible section labels via tooltips. Matches PaiWork's rail.

2. **Workspace panel (280px wide, resizable 220–400px).** Contains:
   - Tab strip *工作区 | Skills* at the top.
   - Scope switch (*个人 / 公共*) just below the tab strip.
   - **工作区:** the folder outline. Tree density matches VS Code (indent 8px, row height 24px, chevron + icon + name + right-aligned count badge).
   - **Skills:** flat list of Skills installed for this user, grouped by section (`轮播` / `其他` / `我的模板`), plus a prominent "Skills广场" CTA at the bottom.

3. **Editor canvas (flex, fills remaining width).** Contains:
   - **Document tab bar** — multiple open docs, each with filename, dirty-dot, ×-close. Middle-click closes, drag reorders. Max 10 open tabs.
   - Under the tab bar, the editor for the *active* tab. For `.xlsx`-type docs: ribbon → sheet tabs → grid. For `.md`: a rich-markdown editor with a toggle between WYSIWYG and source.
   - Status bar at the bottom (sheet name, selected range, sum/avg, save state).

---

## 4. Visual design language

We already use AntD v5 + Tailwind v3, so we are *not* swapping UI libs. We tune tokens.

**Color tokens** (add to `frontend/src/index.css` as CSS variables, used by both AntD `ConfigProvider.theme` and Tailwind classes):

```css
:root {
  --ws-accent: #2ec98a;        /* PaiWork green, used on active rail icon + current folder row */
  --ws-accent-hover: #23b579;
  --ws-accent-soft: #e8f8f0;   /* row-hover and active-tab-background */
  --ws-surface: #ffffff;
  --ws-surface-alt: #f7f9fb;   /* workspace-panel background, sidebar rail */
  --ws-border: #e6e8eb;
  --ws-border-strong: #d1d5db;
  --ws-text-primary: #1a1d21;
  --ws-text-secondary: #6b7280;
  --ws-text-tertiary: #9ca3af;
  --ws-grid-line: #e1e4e8;
  --ws-grid-header-bg: #f1f3f5;
  --ws-grid-selection: #c8eedd; /* cell-range selection tint */
  --ws-radius: 6px;
  --ws-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}
```

We *keep* the existing AntD blue as secondary accent for non-workspace pages — only the `/my-knowledge` subtree is re-themed. Wrap it in a local `ConfigProvider` so we do not affect the rest of the app.

**Typography**
- System font stack (no web fonts — PaiWork appears to use the default Chinese system stack; we match).
- File-tree row: `13px / 20px / 400`.
- Ribbon labels: `12px / 16px / 500`, uppercase-like letter-spacing on the section title only.
- Cell content: `13px / 20px / 400`, monospace tabular numerals (`font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`).
- Filename tabs: `13px / 400`, active tab `500`.

**Spacing scale**: 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 24 / 32. Stick to these — no arbitrary px values in the new components.

**Iconography**: stay on `@ant-design/icons`. Tree icons:
- 📁 general folder: `FolderOutlined` / `FolderOpenOutlined`
- 📊 stock folder: custom `LineChartOutlined` tinted with the stock's market color (US=indigo, HK=violet, A=red)
- 📄 markdown: `FileMarkdownOutlined`
- 🧾 spreadsheet: `TableOutlined`
- ✨ skill: `ThunderboltOutlined`

**Density**: information density is *the* thing PaiWork does better than us. Concretely:
- Tree rows 24px (we have ~32px today).
- 8px indent per level (we have ~24px).
- No extra "card" chrome around the tree — it sits directly on `--ws-surface-alt`.

---

## 5. Feature spec

### 5.1 App rail

- New component `frontend/src/components/WorkspaceRail.tsx`.
- Renders vertically as 48×N rail on the left. Only visible inside `/my-knowledge` for now (other pages keep their existing sidebar). Phase 2 decides whether to globalize.
- Items: *Ask PaiPai* (→ `/ai-chat`), *PaiWork* (→ `/my-knowledge`, selected). Later we add *云盘* / *Dashboard* / *News* / *Portfolio* if we globalize.
- Selected item: accent bar on the left edge + soft tint fill + bold icon. Hover tooltip shows the Chinese name.

### 5.2 Workspace panel — folder tree

- New component `frontend/src/components/workspace/WorkspaceTree.tsx` replaces the in-file `DirectoryTree` inside `MyKnowledgeBase.tsx`.
- **Indent**: 8px per depth level (AntD's default is ~24px).
- **Row**: `[chevron 16px] [icon 16px] [name, truncate] [badge count, right-aligned]`.
- **Stock folder row** shows the ticker on hover in a small right-aligned subtitle (e.g. `英伟达 · NVDA`).
- **Context menu** (right-click, already exists): keep the existing 新建子文件夹 / 重命名 / 删除 set. Add: 新建 .md / 新建 .xlsx / 安装 Skill / 置顶.
- **Drag-drop** — drag a document from one folder to another; drag a folder to reparent it. Uses HTML5 DnD, optimistic update, `PATCH /folders/{id}` or `PATCH /documents/{id}` behind the scenes. This is a new capability.
- **Expand state** persisted in `localStorage` under `workspace:tree:expanded:<scope>` so the tree remembers what's open across reloads (today we recompute from scratch).
- **Scope switch** above the tree — two pill buttons 个人 / 公共 driven by the existing scope state. Moving to a segmented control from the current header.
- **Search box** at the very top: debounced 200ms, filters the tree to rows whose name or tag matches. We wire it to existing `/user-kb/search` for document-content matches, but primary match is folder/document-name.

### 5.3 Document tab bar

- New component `frontend/src/components/workspace/DocumentTabBar.tsx`.
- Store: `useOpenDocsStore` (Zustand), shape:
  ```ts
  { openDocs: {id, title, kind, folderId, dirty}[], activeId: string|null }
  ```
  Persisted to `sessionStorage` so a refresh restores the exact tabs.
- Click doc in tree → open tab (or focus existing). Tabs are persistent; switching folder does **not** close tabs — matches PaiWork.
- Middle-click or × closes. Dirty tabs show a filled dot; closing a dirty tab confirms.
- Up to 10 tabs open at once; opening an 11th evicts the LRU non-active tab (with confirm if dirty).
- Reorder by drag (HTML5 DnD between tab elements).
- Keyboard: `Ctrl+Tab` / `Ctrl+Shift+Tab` cycle; `Ctrl+W` closes; `Ctrl+P` opens a tree quickpick.

### 5.4 Spreadsheet editor — library swap

This is the single biggest change. The existing `SpreadsheetEditor.tsx` (584 lines, custom CSS grid) cannot realistically grow into an Excel-grade experience in a reasonable timeframe. Two options were evaluated:

**Option A — Stay in-house, feature it up.** Add drag-resize columns, copy-paste, undo, more formulas, multi-sheet tabs. Easy to debug, no new dependency. Realistic effort 3–4 weeks to reach parity with what PaiWork shows, and we'd still not have a ribbon, charts, conditional format, or data validation. Every future feature is an engineering project.

**Option B — Adopt [Univer](https://github.com/dream-num/univer) (Apache-2.0).** Modern, actively maintained, ships with an Excel-like ribbon, built-in formula engine (~400 funcs), multiple sheets per document, cell styling, drag-fill, freeze panes, and a plugin architecture. Has first-class React bindings (`@univerjs/presets`). Bundle size ~1.2 MB gzipped (lazy-loadable — only the `/my-knowledge` route pays it). Matches the PaiWork ribbon 1:1 down to the CN localization labels (开始/插入/公式/数据/视图/设置).

**Recommendation: Option B (Univer).** Fallback: Fortune-Sheet if Univer integration issues surface in Phase 0 spike. Luckysheet is ruled out — jQuery-based, awkward inside React. Handsontable ruled out — non-free license required for formulas and multi-sheet. AG Grid is for tabular data, not spreadsheets.

**Integration plan:**

1. Install `@univerjs/presets @univerjs/preset-sheets-core @univerjs/preset-sheets-advanced` with Chinese locale pack.
2. New component `frontend/src/components/workspace/SpreadsheetCanvas.tsx` wraps `createUniver(...)`. Props: `document`, `onChange`, `readonly`. Internally calls `univer.createUnit(UniverInstanceType.UNIVER_SHEET, workbookData)`.
3. **Storage format bridge.** Univer's workbook JSON (`IWorkbookData`) is richer than our flat `{rows, cols, cells}`. We introduce a new `doc_type: "workbook"` that stores Univer JSON directly. Old `doc_type: "spreadsheet"` docs are migrated on first open: the existing 22×8 grid becomes `sheets[{id:"sheet-1", name:"估值表", cellData:{...}}]`, formulas translated (Univer uses Excel syntax, ours already does).
4. **Autosave** stays debounced-1.2s, but now PATCH body is `{ workbook_data: <IWorkbookData> }`. Server validates shape (sheet count ≤ 10, cell count ≤ 200k) and stores the JSON whole.
5. **Excel-style formula bar** — comes free with Univer. We delete the existing custom formula bar.
6. **Multi-sheet tabs** — free from Univer. We wire "+ 新建工作表" / right-click-rename via Univer's Facade API.
7. **Ribbon customization** — Univer allows us to hide unused commands (e.g. 数据验证 if we don't want it yet) to keep the UI tight.

See §7 Phase 2 for day-by-day.

### 5.5 Markdown editor

PaiWork shows `.md` files (`key-driver.md`, `notes.md`) as first-class documents. We don't have this today — our documents are `doc_type: "file"` and render as a detail drawer, not an editor.

**New `doc_type: "markdown"`.** Plain-text content stored in a new `content_md` Mongo field (not GridFS — the files are short). Editor: `@uiw/react-md-editor` (MIT, React-native, zero-config, has CN locale, ~200 KB). Split view by default (source left, rendered right), full-screen toggle, toolbar with bold/italic/heading/list/link/code.

**Templates for seeded markdown:**

`key-driver.md`:
```markdown
# {{stock_name}} 关键驱动

## 核心假设
- 

## 风险因素
- 

## 一句话观点
> 
```

`notes.md`:
```markdown
# {{stock_name}} 研究笔记

> 最近更新：{{today}}

## {{today}}

```

Rendered via `CitationRenderer` we already have for streaming chat, so the inline-citation syntax works here too. AI-chat tool `user_kb_fetch_document` already returns content and does not care about markdown vs file, so RAG is unchanged.

### 5.6 Skills

A **Skill** is a reusable folder-and-file *template* that a user can instantiate into any target folder. Think Obsidian templates or Notion templates. From the reference screenshot, Skills live in their own tab with a Skills广场 (marketplace) entry.

**Minimum viable skill:**
```yaml
# internal YAML used only at seed time
name: 标准 DCF 估值
description: 5 年 DCF 模板 + 假设表 + 敏感性
icon: LineChart
scope: public     # or personal
targets: [stock_folder]    # where the user can install it
files:
  - path: 估值表.xlsx
    kind: workbook
    template: dcf_standard_v1   # ref to a Python-side template factory
  - path: 敏感性分析.xlsx
    kind: workbook
    template: sensitivity_v1
  - path: 估值笔记.md
    kind: markdown
    content: |
      # {{stock_name}} DCF 估值笔记
      ## 核心假设
      - WACC: {{wacc_default}}
      - 永续增长: {{g_default}}
```

Postgres table `kb_skill_templates`:

| column | type | notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | uuid pk | |
| name | text | display name |
| description | text | |
| icon | text | lucide icon name |
| scope | text | `system` / `public` / `personal` |
| owner_id | uuid null | null iff scope=system |
| target_types | text[] | `stock_folder` / `industry_folder` / `general_folder` |
| spec | jsonb | the YAML shape above, parsed |
| is_published | bool | marketplace visibility |
| installs_count | int | telemetry |
| created_at / updated_at | timestamptz | |

**First shipped skills (Phase 4)**:
- `标准 DCF 估值` — today's DEFAULT_VALUATION_TEMPLATE, promoted to a skill. Every new stock folder auto-installs this by default (so we don't regress).
- `三张报表` — 10-year IS / BS / CF scaffold.
- `同业对比` — ticker + 5 comparables × 8 metrics × 3 years.
- `估值敏感性` — 2D sensitivity table (WACC × g).
- `研报纪要模板` (markdown) — for 研报 / 调研 / 专家访谈 subfolders.

Users can also save an existing folder-subtree as a personal Skill: right-click folder → "存为 Skill" → dialog captures name/desc/icon → POST `/user-kb/skills`. This lets the team curate its own templates.

**Install flow**: on a target folder, user clicks Skills tab → ⬇ icon → the skill's files materialize inside that folder with `{{stock_name}}`, `{{today}}`, `{{ticker}}` etc. interpolated. Conflicts (same filename) show a rename-or-overwrite dialog.

### 5.7 Stock-folder sub-taxonomy

Currently a stock folder has just one child: the default 估值表. The reference shows stock folders with many children: `key-driver.md`, `notes.md`, plus `研报 / 公司公告 / 专家访谈 / 公司交流 / 调研 / 模型 / 其他`.

We extend `_perform_holdings_sync` so that when a stock folder is created/reconciled, we also ensure these children exist:

```
英伟达/                    ← folder_type=stock
├── 估值表                 ← existing, unchanged
├── key-driver.md         ← new, seeded from template
├── notes.md              ← new, seeded
├── 研报/                 ← folder_type=general
├── 公司公告/
├── 专家访谈/
├── 公司交流/
├── 调研/
├── 模型/
└── 其他/
```

Idempotent and non-destructive: if the user deletes one, we don't recreate it (same rule we use for the 持仓股票 parent today — stored via `user_preferences.kb_workspace_subfolders_initialized_at`, a new column).

Existing stock folders (users who already have a seeded 估值表) get the new subfolders on their next `/tree` fetch via an upgrade pass guarded by that same timestamp, unless they opted out by deleting one.

---

## 6. Backend changes

### 6.1 `kb_folders` (Postgres) — optional cosmetic columns

Only for future polish; not blocking any phase. *We don't add these until Phase 5 unless needed sooner.*
- `icon` varchar(32) null — override the default market-colored icon.
- `cover_color` varchar(16) null — custom accent per folder.

### 6.2 `user_knowledge_base.documents` (MongoDB) — schema additions

Fields that are added, not renamed. Existing fields unchanged.

| field | type | when populated |
|---|---|---|
| `doc_type` | `"file" / "spreadsheet" / "workbook" / "markdown"` | `workbook` and `markdown` are new values |
| `workbook_data` | object | only when `doc_type=workbook` — Univer `IWorkbookData` JSON |
| `content_md` | string | only when `doc_type=markdown` — raw markdown, bounded at 1 MB |
| `template_source` | object | `{skill_id, variables}` if document was materialized from a skill — for traceability |

Migration of existing `doc_type=spreadsheet` docs:
- Lazy migration on first GET of `/documents/{id}/spreadsheet`. Detect old shape, wrap into a single-sheet Univer workbook named "估值表", write back with `doc_type=workbook`. 5-line function, fully reversible until we flip the default seed to `workbook`.

### 6.3 `kb_skill_templates` (Postgres) — new table

See §5.6 for columns. Alembic migration `r1s2t3u4v5w6_add_kb_skill_templates`.

### 6.4 `user_preferences` — new column

- `kb_workspace_subfolders_initialized_at` timestamptz null — gates the stock-folder sub-taxonomy seeding (parallel to the existing `kb_holdings_initialized_at`).

### 6.5 API surface

Additions to `backend/app/api/user_kb.py`:

| method | path | purpose |
|---|---|---|
| POST | `/documents` | extend payload: `doc_type` selector; `markdown` path creates a `content_md` doc without GridFS |
| PATCH | `/documents/{id}/markdown` | save `content_md` |
| GET | `/documents/{id}/workbook` | fetch Univer workbook JSON |
| PATCH | `/documents/{id}/workbook` | save Univer workbook JSON (size cap enforced server-side) |
| GET | `/skills` | list skills visible to caller (system + own personal + public) |
| POST | `/skills` | create a personal skill from a folder snapshot |
| PATCH | `/skills/{id}` | edit name/desc/spec (owner only) |
| DELETE | `/skills/{id}` | (owner or admin) |
| POST | `/folders/{id}/install-skill` | materialize a skill's files into a folder |
| POST | `/folders/{id}/ensure-stock-children` | idempotent sub-taxonomy seeding; called implicitly by `/tree`, explicitly for re-sync |

The existing `/documents/{id}/spreadsheet` endpoints stay, backed by the migration-on-read path, until all docs are upgraded.

---

## 7. Phased rollout

Each phase ends with a demoable slice. Work is done on feature branches, merged behind a `WORKSPACE_V2` flag (frontend: Zustand init reads `localStorage.workspace_v2`; backend: no flag needed, schema additions are additive). We flip the flag to default-on at end of Phase 3.

### Phase 0 — Spike & foundations (2 days)

- [ ] 4 h: Prototype Univer integration inside a blank Vite route (`/dev/univer`). Confirm: ribbon renders, CN locale works, 5-year DCF template round-trips, autosave hook works, bundle size ≤1.5 MB gzipped, no proxy/worker issues with our dev server setup.
- [ ] 2 h: Lock color tokens in `index.css`. Wire AntD `ConfigProvider` with `theme.algorithm + token` overrides; confirm no bleed into other pages.
- [ ] 2 h: Add `workspace_v2` feature flag; dead-code path in `MyKnowledgeBase.tsx`.
- [ ] 2 h: Add Alembic migration for `kb_workspace_subfolders_initialized_at` on `user_preferences`.
- [ ] 1 h: Add schema field validators for new `doc_type` values.

**Exit criterion**: Univer editing a seed DCF works end-to-end in the spike route; feature flag flips cleanly.

### Phase 1 — Shell & navigation (3 days)

- [ ] WorkspaceRail component.
- [ ] WorkspaceTree component (density, icons, indent, badge).
- [ ] DocumentTabBar + Zustand store + sessionStorage persistence.
- [ ] Three-pane layout replaces the current two-pane split in `MyKnowledgeBase.tsx`.
- [ ] 工作区/Skills tab switch; Skills tab shows "暂未安装" placeholder.
- [ ] Drag-drop reparent (folder→folder, doc→folder).
- [ ] Keyboard: Ctrl+Tab / Ctrl+W / Ctrl+P quickpick.

Old SpreadsheetEditor is still what renders inside tabs — we haven't swapped yet. Regression-safe.

**Exit criterion**: open 3 tabs, edit 估值表, switch stocks, tabs persist, drag-reorder tabs, drag-drop a doc into another folder.

### Phase 2 — Univer integration (5 days)

- [ ] Install Univer preset packages; configure code-split (`React.lazy`).
- [ ] SpreadsheetCanvas wrapper with autosave plumbing.
- [ ] Workbook JSON ↔ old `spreadsheet_data` bridge + one-shot migration on read.
- [ ] Backend: `/documents/{id}/workbook` GET/PATCH; size cap 5 MB payload, reject shapes with >10 sheets or >200k cells.
- [ ] Frontend: feature-flagged switch — when `workspace_v2` + doc is a workbook, render Univer; otherwise fall back to legacy `SpreadsheetEditor`.
- [ ] Promote the 22×8 DCF scaffold into a Univer workbook template (`dcf_standard_v1`) used both by new-stock seeding and by the skill install path.
- [ ] Visual polish: hide the Univer features we don't want (pivot, data validation, print) to keep chrome tight.
- [ ] "+ 新建工作表" works; renaming sheet tabs via dblclick works.

**Exit criterion**: the screenshot-2 experience is achievable for 估值表 — Excel-style ribbon, multi-sheet tabs, drag-fill, formulas including IF/VLOOKUP, paste from Excel.

### Phase 3 — Markdown docs + stock sub-taxonomy (3 days)

- [ ] `doc_type=markdown` backend paths + `content_md` validation.
- [ ] MarkdownCanvas with `@uiw/react-md-editor`, split/source/preview toggle.
- [ ] Stock-folder sub-taxonomy seeder in `_perform_holdings_sync` (idempotent, gated by new pref column).
- [ ] Templates for `key-driver.md` / `notes.md` with interpolation (`{{stock_name}}`, `{{ticker}}`, `{{today}}`).
- [ ] Tree icons differentiate `.md` vs `.xlsx` vs folder.
- [ ] "新建 .md" / "新建 .xlsx" in folder context menu.

**Exit criterion**: a fresh 持仓股票 sync produces exactly the screenshot-2 layout under each stock (key-driver.md, notes.md, 估值表, plus 7 subfolders).

### Phase 4 — Skills (5 days)

- [ ] `kb_skill_templates` table + Alembic migration.
- [ ] `/skills` CRUD endpoints + permissions.
- [ ] `/folders/{id}/install-skill` (with placeholder interpolation).
- [ ] Skills tab UI: list, install button, detail drawer, Skills广场 link.
- [ ] Ship 5 system skills (DCF / 三张报表 / 同业 / 敏感性 / 研报纪要).
- [ ] "存为 Skill" from a folder (dialog + snapshot serializer).
- [ ] New stock seeding switches from hard-coded DEFAULT_VALUATION_TEMPLATE to auto-install of the `标准DCF` system skill — unifying the codepath.

**Exit criterion**: a user can install "三张报表" into any stock folder and instantly get 3 pre-built worksheets.

### Phase 5 — Polish (3 days)

- [ ] Default `workspace_v2` to on; remove flag after a week of soak.
- [ ] Breadcrumb in the editor canvas shows market badge + last quote (reuses `useQuote(ticker)` that Portfolio uses).
- [ ] "Ask PaiPai about this cell" context-menu entry that pipes cell content + surrounding labels into the AI chat page.
- [ ] Empty states for each pane (no tabs open, empty folder, no skills).
- [ ] A11y pass: focus ring on tabs, screen-reader labels on rail icons.
- [ ] Docs: update `GUIDE.md` and `CLAUDE.md` (the "Knowledge Base" sections) to reflect the workbook schema.

**Exit criterion**: the old SpreadsheetEditor, old DirectoryTree path, and `workspace_v2` flag can be deleted with zero test fails.

**Total: 21 engineering days** (≈ 4 working weeks solo, or ~2.5 weeks with a frontend+backend pair).

---

## 8. Risks & how we defuse them

| Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| Univer bundle bloat regresses first-page TTI for users who aren't on this route | `React.lazy` the whole SpreadsheetCanvas; it only loads on first document open. Measure with `npm run build && du -h dist/assets/*.js`. Exit Phase 0 if >1.5MB gz. |
| Univer licensing: Apache-2.0 on core, but some plugins (collab, print) are dual-licensed | We stay on free plugins only (`preset-sheets-core`, `preset-sheets-advanced`). No collab. Document the boundary in `workbook_data` MRs so future contributors don't accidentally reach for paid features. |
| Existing spreadsheet docs get corrupted by the migration | Migration is lazy-on-read and the old shape is preserved in a sibling field `spreadsheet_data_legacy` for 30 days. A revert is: flip to legacy editor, drop `workbook_data`. |
| The sub-taxonomy seeding produces 10× more docs per user (from ~30 to ~300); Mongo + frontend tree perf | Most subfolders are empty directories (no documents). `get_folder_document_counts()` already aggregates; we add a tree-level cache keyed by `(user_id, scope)`, invalidated on folder/doc writes. |
| A user with a half-seeded tree (e.g. from a previous 持仓股票 init) has inconsistent state | Idempotent seeder with `ensure_*` semantics — only creates what's missing; logs & proceeds on any conflict. |
| Drag-drop in tree is easy to get wrong (reparent into own descendant, cycle in the folder graph) | Service-layer cycle check already exists (`update_folder` validates parent is not a descendant). Front-end also visually disables a drop target that would create a cycle. |
| Skills with arbitrary user JSON specs become a security issue (XSS via markdown template) | We sanitize all interpolations server-side, and `{{foo}}` is restricted to a whitelist: `stock_name`, `ticker`, `market`, `today`, `user_name`. No HTML/JS evaluation. |
| The Ant Design `DirectoryTree` we rely on today has baked-in a11y that a hand-rolled tree loses | New WorkspaceTree should follow WAI-ARIA Treeview spec (role=tree, role=treeitem, aria-level). A11y pass explicitly in Phase 5. |

---

## 9. Acceptance / test plan

**Manual (per phase)** — documented in the phase exit criteria above.

**Automated (add during Phase 2/3)** — `backend/tests/test_user_kb_workbook.py` with cases:
1. GET `/workbook` on an unmigrated `spreadsheet` doc lazily migrates and returns workbook JSON.
2. PATCH `/workbook` with >200k cells → 413.
3. Seeding a fresh holdings tree yields the exact sub-taxonomy for each stock (assert folder names + existence of `key-driver.md` + `估值表`).
4. Installing a system skill into a stock folder creates N documents with interpolated names.
5. Deleting a seeded subfolder and re-running the sync does *not* recreate it.

Frontend — no new framework, but we add component-level sanity checks with existing `tsc --noEmit` and a `vite build` smoke before each merge. The existing `frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` should stay clean.

**Soak** — Phase 5 flips the flag on for the whole team for 1 week; we watch `logs/backend.log` and Mongo doc counts for anomalies (doc churn, oversized workbook PATCH rejections).

---

## 10. Open questions (for the user to decide before we start)

1. **Skills visibility model** — should personal Skills be shareable team-wide via a "公共" scope, or stay per-user only in v1? *Default: per-user only; public scope reserved for admin-published skills.*
2. **Markdown editor UX** — WYSIWYG-default (Milkdown) vs source-default (`@uiw/react-md-editor` split view)? The reference shows what looks like plain markdown text, so source-default is the lower-risk pick. *Default: `@uiw/react-md-editor` split.*
3. **Color accent** — green to match PaiWork, or keep our indigo-blue brand? Green on this page only is the proposal. *Default: green, scoped to `/my-knowledge` subtree.*
4. **Do we globalize the app rail now** (replacing the current sidebar across the app), or leave it scoped to `/my-knowledge` until the rest of the app gets the same treatment? *Default: scoped, revisit after Phase 5.*
5. **Stock sub-taxonomy defaults** — the reference shows 研报 / 公司公告 / 专家访谈 / 公司交流 / 调研 / 模型 / 其他. Do we want to include 轮播 (roadshow) as a named subfolder or fold it into 公司交流? *Default: separate 轮播 subfolder, matches AlphaPai type taxonomy.*

None of these block Phase 0 / 1. Decide by end of Phase 1 so Phase 2+3 can be definitive.

---

## 11. What we are *not* touching

- AI Chat page (`/ai-chat`). No change to `chat_llm.py`, tool registrations, or the SSE protocol.
- Portfolio, Dashboard, News, Watchlist — no change.
- Crawler pipelines — no change. The workspace is a consumer of shared KB, not the producer.
- Vector-retrieval (`user_kb_search`, `user_kb_fetch_document`) — the chunk/Milvus pipeline stays. For markdown docs we tokenize `content_md` on PATCH with the same chunker we use for uploaded `.md` files.

---
